title: lacinaria scariosa var. borealis
intro: Lacinaria scariosa var. borealis is a variety of the Lacinaria scariosa plant, also known as the Borealis or Northern Yarrow, a perennial plant native to northern Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lacinaria scariosa var. borealis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
